title: stenocalyx xanthoxyloides
intro: Stenocalyx xanthoxyloides is a tropical plant species, also known as the yellow-wood, which belongs to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Stenocalyx xanthoxyloides has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. The plant is used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
